infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: Cappy reads the NFC sticker on your medication bottle to open the right child and medication instantly. We never read personal data from the tag.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Face ID lets you confirm a dose without typing your password.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Cappy lets you choose a photo to identify each family member.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Cappy lets you take a photo to identify each family member.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Cappy reads weight from Apple Health (with your permission) to keep dosing accurate. Weight is only imported when you tap Import, and you review it before saving.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Cappy does not write data to Apple Health. This permission is required by the health library Cappy uses to read weight.
infoPlist.NSNearbyInteractionUsageDescription: Cappy uses Nearby Interaction to tell how close another iPhone is, so a family invite only sends once you actually hold the two phones together.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Cappy looks for a nearby iPhone on your local network to send a family invite directly, phone to phone.

plugins.photosPermission: Cappy lets you choose a photo to identify each family member.
plugins.cameraPermission: Cappy lets you take a photo to identify each family member.
